name: nonstop
description: Autonomous non-stop working mode with SCBE infrastructure integration

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous work mode for SCBE loops and long-running execution.
interface.longDescription: Run SCBE-oriented nonstop work loops with autonomous execution patterns, persistent task flow, and infrastructure-aware work mode support.
defaultPrompt: Run a nonstop autonomous work loop for this task.
Inspect the nonstop plugin skills and hooks.
Use nonstop mode to keep work moving without idle gaps.
